evals.prompt: I have an Extended Events trace covering 30 minutes of production yesterday. CPU was pegged at 95%. Analyze it for top consumers and N+1 patterns.
evals.expected_output: Top consumers by CPU and reads (X1, X2). Workload aggregate findings (X13-X20) including N+1 detection. Parameter sniffing signal if duration variance is high (X14). Structured format with Passed Checks.

evals.prompt: Trace shows a query that runs 10,000 times in 5 minutes. Tell me if that is N+1 and what to do.
evals.expected_output: X16 N+1 pattern fires above high-frequency threshold. Recommends batching, set-based replacement, or app-layer caching.
